# Diagnostic codes emitted by the compiler but not yet in a registry doc.
# Policy: SHRINK-ONLY. Register a code in compiler-diagnostics.md (with a description) and
# remove it here. The conformance test (diagnostic-namespace.test.mjs) fails on any NEW
# unregistered code, and on any entry here that is already registered.
# Baseline 2026-06-16: 65 codes. Reconciled 64 into compiler-diagnostics.md; 1 remains:
#
# LLN-RUNTIME-EFFECT-GATE — a runtime effect-gate identifier (not a compiler diagnostic with a
# message); needs a runtime-codes section before registration. Tracked, not fabricated.
LLN-RUNTIME-EFFECT-GATE
